effects.effect:
You can only activate this card if you have 3+ face-down cards in your FP Zone. 
 
When your Opponent would activate an Action Card: you can negate the activation of that Action Card, and if you do, apply 1 of these effects: 
• Deal 70 damage to 1 of your Opponent's Vivosaurs 
• Rest 1 of your Opponent's Vivosaurs 
You can apply both effects you have "Dynal" in your discard pile.
